widgets.title: Hashtag Count by Platform
widgets.description: Sum of hashtags used in posts grouped by social media platform.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "platform" AS label, CAST(SUM("hashtag_count") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_social_media" GROUP BY "platform" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Hashtag Count Distribution by Post Type
widgets.description: Shows the total hashtag count aggregated by each post type to understand hashtag usage patterns across different post formats.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "post_type" AS label, CAST(SUM(try_cast("hashtag_count" AS DOUBLE)) AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_social_media" GROUP BY "post_type" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 8

widgets.title: Mention Count by Platform Over Sentiment Label
widgets.description: Average mention count per post grouped by platform and sentiment label.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "sentiment_label" AS x, "platform" AS series, CAST(AVG(try_cast("mention_count" AS DOUBLE)) AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_social_media" GROUP BY x, series ORDER BY x ASC, series ASC LIMIT 500

widgets.title: Total Hashtag Count
widgets.description: Sum of all hashtags used across all social media posts.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT 'Total Hashtag Count' AS label, CAST(SUM("hashtag_count") AS DOUBLE) AS value, 0.0 AS delta, 'positive' AS sentiment, 'overall' AS delta_basis FROM "t_social_media" LIMIT 1

widgets.title: Hashtag Count vs Mention Count Correlation
widgets.description: Scatter plot showing correlation between hashtag count and mention count per post.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "post_id" AS col1, CAST("hashtag_count" AS DOUBLE) AS x, CAST("mention_count" AS DOUBLE) AS y FROM "t_social_media" LIMIT 1000

widgets.title: Platform × Post Type Heatmap
widgets.description: Average engagement rate percentage by platform and post type
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "platform" AS row, "post_type" AS col, CAST(AVG("engagement_rate_pct") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_social_media" GROUP BY "platform", "post_type" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 400

widgets.title: Mention Count Volume Over Sentiment Label
widgets.description: Total mention counts aggregated by sentiment label to visualize volume distribution across sentiment categories.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "sentiment_label" AS x, CAST(SUM("mention_count") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_social_media" GROUP BY "sentiment_label" ORDER BY x ASC LIMIT 500

widgets.title: Platform Ranked by Mention Count
widgets.description: Sum of mention counts grouped by social media platform, ranked descending.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "platform" AS label, CAST(SUM("mention_count") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_social_media" GROUP BY "platform" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Platform Composition by Post Type
widgets.description: Stacked bar chart showing the count of posts per platform, broken down by post type to visualize the composition of post types on each platform.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "platform" AS label, "post_type" AS "group", CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_social_media" GROUP BY "platform", "post_type" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Multi-Metric Profile by Platform
widgets.description: Average key engagement metrics per social media platform to compare performance profiles.
widgets.dataKey:
SELECT "platform" AS axis, 
  CAST(AVG("engagement_rate_pct") AS DOUBLE) AS "value" 
FROM "t_social_media" 
GROUP BY "platform" 
ORDER BY "value" DESC 
LIMIT 12

widgets.title: Hashtag Count vs Mention Count by Platform
widgets.description: Comparison of average hashtag count and mention count per post grouped by social media platform.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "platform" AS label, CAST(AVG("hashtag_count") AS DOUBLE) AS value1, CAST(AVG("mention_count") AS DOUBLE) AS value2 FROM "t_social_media" GROUP BY "platform" ORDER BY (value1 + value2) DESC LIMIT 20

widgets.title: Media Count Proportion by Platform
widgets.description: Shows the total media count aggregated by social media platform to visualize the distribution of media usage across platforms.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "platform" AS label, CAST(SUM(TRY_CAST("media_count" AS DOUBLE)) AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_social_media" GROUP BY "platform" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 30
